Defines standard C macros and constants for file operations, exit codes, and boolean values.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines several macros and constants commonly used in C programming. It includes definitions for `NULL`, buffer size (`BUFSIZ`), maximum number of files that can be opened (`FOPEN_MAX`), and maximum filename length (`FILENAME_MAX`). It also defines file seek constants `SEEK_SET`, `SEEK_CUR`, and `SEEK_END` for file offset operations. Additionally, it provides exit status codes `EXIT_FAILURE` and `EXIT_SUCCESS`, and sets limits for random number generation (`RAND_MAX`) and integer values (`INT_MAX`). The file also includes basic boolean definitions, setting `true` and `false` as 1 and 0, respectively, and indicates that these boolean values are defined with `__bool_true_false_are_defined`.
